description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages ci-build, build, test, and deploy and set the default image to $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:ci. In the ci-build stage add a ci-build job that uses the kaniko executor image (gcr.io/kaniko-project/executor:debug) with an empty entrypoint, runs `mkdir -p /kaniko/.docker`, writes a Docker config containing $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD to /kaniko/.docker/config.json, then executes `/kaniko/executor --context $CI_PROJECT_DIR --dockerfile $CI_PROJECT_DIR/Dockerfile.ci --destination $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:ci --cache=true`. In the build stage add a binary:debug job that runs `make debug` and publishes the artifacts advent, cheat, *.o, dungeon.c, dungeon.h; a binary:release job that runs `make advent cheat` with the same artifacts; a dist job that runs `export VERS=${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}` and `make dist -e` publishing *.tar.gz; an html job that runs `make html` publishing *.html; and a manpage job that runs `make advent.6` publishing advent.6. In the test stage add a test:debug job that depends on binary:debug, runs `make coverage` and stores the coverage artifact, and a test:release job that depends on binary:release, runs `cd tests`, `make`, and `cd ..`. Finally, in the deploy stage add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, depends on test:debug, executes `mkdir public` and `mv coverage public`, and publishes the public directory as the pages artifact.
